hero_headline_1: Your business has digital ideas waiting.
hero_headline_2: You need someone to make them happen.
hero_input_placeholder: What do you need to bring to life?
hero_note: No strings attached. I reply today.
pain_title: Do any of these situations sound familiar?
pain_body: Most business owners who reach out to me don't have a technical problem. They have a time and trust problem.
pain_1: "I want a website or an online store, but I don't know where to start or who to trust."
pain_2: "I have an idea to automate something in my business, but I don't have the staff or the time to do it."
pain_3: "I asked an agency for a quote and the price seemed excessive for what I actually need."
pain_4: "I already hired someone and they disappeared with the deposit, or delivered something useless."
services_body: I'm not an agency. I'm a real, local person you can call, meet in person, and who responds when you need me. I use artificial intelligence to deliver in days what used to take weeks.
service_1_desc: So your customers can find you, trust you, and contact you.
service_2_desc: Sell online without complications. Payments, catalog, orders.
service_3_desc: If you have a process that should be automated, we automate it.
service_4_desc: Videos, images, and copy for your social media. Production without agency costs.
service_5_desc: From idea to printed book. Position yourself as an expert in your industry.
service_6_desc: Eliminate repetitive manual tasks. Your team does what matters.
proof_title: What I already built for an import company in Iquique
proof_body: An import-export company in the free trade zone had an idea: they needed an application to manage their internal operations. They didn't know how to do it. Within days they had their app up and running.
guarantee_headline: If you're not satisfied with the result, you don't pay.
guarantee_body: It's that simple. I work to earn your trust, not to charge you and disappear.
diff_title: What you won't find at a traditional agency.
diff_1: I'm from Iquique. I can meet you in person, truly understand your business, and be available when you need me.
diff_2: I work with cutting-edge AI. What used to take weeks, I now deliver in days, without sacrificing quality.
diff_3: No agency overhead, no inflated costs. You pay for results, not for hours of meetings and bureaucracy.
diff_4: A single point of contact: me. The same person who understands your idea, executes it, and responds if something needs adjusting.
diff_5: I work with free trade zone companies, mall retailers, and service businesses across the city. I know the local context.
how_1_desc: Via WhatsApp, phone, or in person. No jargon. You tell me what you have in mind and I understand how to turn it into something real.
how_2_desc: What I'll do, how much it costs, and when you'll have it. No fine print, no surprises later.
how_3_title: We execute and you get it working
how_3_desc: I work fast. In days you have something concrete, not promises. And we stay in touch if you need adjustments.
cta_body: No strings attached. Tell me what you have in mind and I'll honestly tell you if I can make it happen, how much it costs, and when you'll have it.
whatsapp_message_prefix: Hello, I'm contacting you from your website. I need the following:
whatsapp_message_default: Hello, I'd like to tell you about an idea I have for my business.
casos_headline: Vida Digital eliminated 2 months of administrative chaos per trip to China
casos_subtitle: How a ZOFRI importer went from notebooks and Excel to having their business up to date — in real time — without depending on anyone to see it.
casos_challenge_body_1: Pravin Arwani has 25 years in import and export at ZOFRI.
casos_challenge_body_2: Every time he traveled to China, the business kept running. But when he returned, two months of accumulated work were waiting for him.
casos_challenge_body_3: General ledger. Bank accounts. Stock. Sales notes. Customers.
casos_challenge_body_4: Everything on paper. Everything in Excel. Everything mixed together.
casos_challenge_quote: "It was very hard for me to keep up with the general ledger, the bank accounts, the stock, the sales notes, the customers. It was a tremendous mess."
casos_challenge_body_5: And when a wholesale customer asked for a price catalog, preparing it took hours.
casos_solution_body_1: We built a custom application for Vida Digital.
casos_solution_body_2: Not a generic template. Not software from another country that needs to be adapted.
casos_solution_body_3: A tool designed exactly for how Pravin works: his petty cash, his general ledger, his stock, his customers, his orders to China.
casos_metric_1_desc: Time recovered for sales and growth
casos_metric_2_desc: Catching up after a trip to China
casos_metric_3_desc: Time to prepare a price catalog
casos_testimonial_quote: "It used to cost me a lot. At least two months of work to catch up. Now everything is up to date in real time. Almost three quarters of my work has decreased. Time I can now dedicate to sales."
casos_cta_title: If you run your business in Excel or on paper, you already know how much that disorder is costing you.
casos_cta_subtitle: Tell me how you work. I'll tell you in 24 hours if I can help you.
